channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Casey Anthony joins TikTok and Substack to ‘advocate’ for herself
item.description: More than a decade after Casey Anthony was accused of murdering her daughter in one of the country’s most notorious murder cases, this weekend she emerged on TikTok to reintroduce herself.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Elon Musk’s bumbling X posts are inadvertently teaching everyone how government works
item.description: If what you don’t know can’t hurt you, Elon Musk may be in luck. With a series of candid posts on X, the White House’s resident broligarch has lately been divulging which aspects of civics and data science he appears to know little about.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: Cybercrime crew stole then resold hundreds of tickets to Swift concerts, prosecutors say
item.description: A cybercrime crew stole then resold more than 900 digital tickets to Taylor Swift concerts and other pricey events.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Opera adds ‘Browser Operator,’ an AI agent, to its browser
item.description: Opera has announced that its browser is now equipped with Browser Operator, a built-in AI agent that can help users with a variety of tasks. For example, if an Opera user wants help buying a large pack of socks in a certain color or booking a flight, the user can ask Browser Operator can do it.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: TikTok’s ‘airport theory’ dares you to arrive just 15 minutes before your flight
item.description: When it comes to airports, travelers tend to fall into two camps. There are the anxious types who show up four hours early, with plenty of time to leisurely peruse duty-free and enjoy the airport lounge.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: The third coming of Microsoft AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman
item.description: Microsoft employees stream down a hallway by the dozen, smartphones and paper coffee cups in hand, many clad in heavy coats on this frigid February morning. The setting is idyllic—Lake Washington is in full view through floor-to-ceiling windows—but they stride purposefully.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: AI Chip Startup Fractile Aims to Shake Up Industry with Innovative Approach
item.description: Fractile, a UK-based AI hardware company, is working on an innovative approach to deliver AI chips that are 100 times faster, 10 times cheaper, and 20 times more energy efficient than Nvidia GPUs.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Democrat questions Rubio over reported State Department Tesla purchase
item.description: Sen. Richard Blumenthal (D-Conn.) pressed the State Department on Monday for answers about the agency’s plans to purchase $400 million worth of armored Teslas after new reporting disputed its initial claims about the contract.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Bang & Olufsen's latest reworked turntable is a masterpiece of retro revival, in a breathtaking wooden presentation box
item.description: A design classic returns and is even more desirable than before – but don't expect to see them in stores.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: El CIO ante el desafío de gestionar los agentes de IA
item.description: En un escenario en el que los agentes de IA ya están preparados para hacerse cargo de gran parte del flujo de trabajo de las empresas, los líderes de TI tendrán que afrontar un reto cada vez más complejo: gestionarlos.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Hulu ended its first live Oscars stream before the final awards. Viewers were not happy
item.description: Sunday night marked Hulu’s first time airing the Oscars live. But its Academy Awards debut ended on a chaotic and frustratingly premature note.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Download the UEM vendor comparison chart, 2025 edition
item.description: Unified endpoint management (UEM) is a strategic IT approach that consolidates how enterprises secure and manage an array of deployed devices including phones, tablets, PCs, and even IoT devices.
item.dc:creator: us

item.title: Intel’s anticipated $28 billion chip factories in Ohio are delayed until 2030
item.description: Intel‘s promised $28 billion chip fabrication plants in Ohio are facing further delays, with the first factory in New Albany expected to not be completed until 2030, local media outlet The Columbus Dispatch reported on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Chip Ganassi Racing partners with OpenAI in first motorsports venture for AI company
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — Chip Ganassi Racing on Friday said it has partnered on a strategic research collaboration with OpenAI — a deal that makes the two-time reigning IndyCar championship winning team the first to bring in a partner from the artificial intelligence field.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Microsoft shutting down Skype in May
item.description: Microsoft is closing down Skype, the video-calling service it bought for $8.5 billion in 2011, which had helped spark a transformation in how people communicate online.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: AI & Data Exchange 2025: GAO’s Lindsey Saul on AI helping speed data analytics, improve oversight
item.description: AI presents opportunities for greater efficiency, but GAO chief data officer says its effectiveness hinges on data quality. The post AI & Data Exchange 2025: GAO’s Lindsey Saul on AI helping speed data analytics, improve oversight first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network

item.title: Apple, Samsung strike deal for purchase of San Jose office building
item.description: Samsung has bought from Apple a big office building in San Jose, a deal that would enable the tech and consumer electronics titan to widen its Silicon Valley footprint.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: How secure information sharing can be easier, less burdensome
item.description: Bill Anderson, the principal product manager at Mattermost, said agencies need to understand how to remove some of the complexities to improve collaboration. The post How secure information sharing can be easier, less burdensome first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Gabbard decries Britain's reported demand for Apple to provide backdoor access to users' cloud data
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard says she has serious concerns about the British government's reported demand that Apple provide backdoor access to any data stored in the cloud.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: One Tech Tip: Getting a lot of unwanted phone calls? Here are ways to stop them
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Unwanted phone calls are out of control. Whether it's a robocall trying to sell you something or spam calls from scammers trying to rip you off, it's enough to make you want to stop answering your phone.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NFL NextGen Stats team unveils new tool to help fans better understand combine results
item.description: The NFL scouting combine provides a blizzard of data with hundreds of prospects running through various drills ranging from the 40-yard dash to the vertical jump to a short shuttle.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Long-dormant Mac malware returns with advanced capabilities
item.description: Just two months into 2025 there have been numerous Mac malware threats targeting Apple laptops, ranging from infostealers to malicious software.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AI & Data Exchange 2025: Salesforce’s Jamison Braun on how AI is reshaping public service
item.description: Agencies are driven by rapid technology changes, upskilling needs and a high bar for CX, Salesforce’s vice president of strategy and business development says. The post AI & Data Exchange 2025: Salesforce’s Jamison Braun on how AI is reshaping public service first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network

item.title: F5 targets AI application security with renewed workload management software
item.description: F5 is evolving its core application and load balancing software to help customers secure and manage AI-powered and multicloud workloads.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: AI & Data Exchange 2025: Guidehouse’s Stuart Brown on AI and digital modernization trends for 2025
item.description: Expect a key trend to be updates to IT architectures so agencies can take advantage of large language models, the Guidehouse digital leader says. The post AI & Data Exchange 2025: Guidehouse’s Stuart Brown on AI and digital modernization trends for 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Vietnam plans energy shift toward building more solar, less reliance on gas and coal
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam is revising its energy plans to focus more on large solar farms and less on reliance on coal and natural gas. The fast-growing economy now aims to get 16% of its energy from the sun — more than triple its earlier target of just 5%.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: What’s next for Microsoft’s Semantic Kernel
item.description: At the heart of Microsoft’s AI application development strategy is Semantic Kernel, an open source set of tools for managing and orchestrating AI prompts.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Nvidia sales surge in the fourth quarter on demand for AI chips
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Nvidia on Wednesday reported a surge in fourth-quarter profit and sales as demand for its specialized Blackwell chips, which power artificial intelligence systems, continued to grow, sending the company's stock higher after hours. For the three months that ended Jan.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Man who said he was upset with Musk and Trump charged with threatening to burn down xAI facility
item.description: ASHLAND CITY, Tenn. (AP) — A Tennessee man has been charged with an act of terrorism after he threatened to burn down an xAI facility because he was upset with its founder, Elon Musk, and President Donald Trump, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX prepares for 8th Starship launch, pending FAA approval
item.description: SpaceX is slated to launch its Starship for the eighth time from Boca Chica, Texas, Friday, though plans could be thwarted if the FAA fails to give the green light.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
